reviews.comment:
Esta toda la noche. Pero no así la tienda por si querés comprar algo de noche. Esta bueno que queda muy cómoda la bajada directo de la autovía y no tenes que entrar en las colectoras.

(Translated by Google)
It's open all night. But the store isn't, in case you want to buy something at night. It's great that it's very convenient to get off the highway directly and you don't have to go on the service roads.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7326459960207089806/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURRd1pMekZ3EAE
